subcodes.first_line: When the Promise was fulfilled and the Promised One appeared, the hearts of them that had disbelieved in God, the One, the Chosen, were seized with perturbation. How many a learned one [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اذا اتی الوعد و ظهر الموعود اضطربت افئدة الذین کفروا بالله الواحد المختار کم من عالم
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @knowledge; recognition of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
